'''dawacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leading|leading]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leading|leading]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dawacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæwæchæth|dæwæchæth]] || [[word:dæwæchæj|dæwæchæj]] || [[word:dæwæchæsh|dæwæchæsh]] || [[word:dæwæchæ|dæwæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dawawachath|dawawachath]] || [[word:dawawachaj|dawawachaj]] || [[word:dawawachash|dawawachash]] || [[word:dawawacha|dawawacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dawachath|dawachath]] || [[word:dawachaj|dawachaj]] || [[word:dawachash|dawachash]] || [[word:dawacha|dawacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dawafchath|dawafchath]] || [[word:dawafchaj|dawafchaj]] || [[word:dawafchash|dawafchash]] || [[word:dawafchaf|dawafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dawachatha|dawachatha]] || [[word:dawachaja|dawachaja]] || [[word:dawachasha|dawachasha]] || [[word:dawachaka|dawachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dawachath|dawachath]] || [[word:dawachaj|dawachaj]] || [[word:dawachash|dawachash]] || [[word:dawacha|dawacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dawachathal|dawachathal]] || [[word:dawachajal|dawachajal]] || [[word:dawachashal|dawachashal]] || [[word:dawachakal|dawachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dawachathatha|dawachathatha]] || [[word:dawachajaja|dawachajaja]] || [[word:dawachashasha|dawachashasha]] || [[word:dawachaka|dawachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dawachathan|dawachathan]] || [[word:dawachajan|dawachajan]] || [[word:dawachashan|dawachashan]] || [[word:dawachakan|dawachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dawachathaoro|dawachathaoro]] || [[word:dawachajaoro|dawachajaoro]] || [[word:dawachashaoro|dawachashaoro]] || [[word:dawachakaoro|dawachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
